paragraphs.text: ABBA JULIAN THE STYLITE The orthodox stylite, as though by divine inspiration, intimated that he would like the herctic to send him a portion of his eucharist. The Abba Cyril, the disciple of the aforementioned Abba Julian the heretic was delighted, thinking that he had led the other astray and Stylite, told this story: he sent the required portion immediately without the slightest delay.

I and my father and brother, hearing what was said about Abba The orthodox took the portion which was sent to him by the heretic Julian, came to him from our own country. I liad an incurable (the sacrameat of the Severan sect, that is) and cast it into a pot disease which no doctor was able to heal. The elder healed me with which he had brought to the boil before him—and it was dissolved prayer as soon as I arrived. So the three of us stayed with him and by the boiling of the pot. Then he took the holy eucharist of the renounced <the world>. The elder appointed my father to be in orthodox church and cast it into the pot. Immediately the pot was charge of the grain. One day my father came to Abba Julian and cooled. The holy communion remained safe and undampened. He said: ‘We have no grain’. The elder replied: ‘Go, gather together still keeps it, for he showed it to us when we visited him. whatever you can find and grind it up. God will take care of tomorrow for us’. AND ANOTHER MIRACLE OF THE MOST HOLY SACRAMENT When need became very pressing, the elder indicated that he was to come to him and as soon as he entered, he said to him: ‘Brother There is a market-town in Cyprus called Tadai which contains a Conon, go and prepare whatever you find for the brethren’. Almost monastery located near a place called Philoxenos. Having released the Jock he wanted to open Melitene. When he saw this he humbly prostrated tion, but he would not be comforted. He told them all: ‘I am as himself before the elder, glorifying God. great a sinner as there has been from Adam to this day’. We said to him: ‘But abba, in truth, sir, nobody is really sinless except one:
